title: Official Resume (June 2022) — sophomore-year baseline
html:
TL;DR

  • June 25, 2022 resume — Yahir's freshman-finishing / sophomore-entering snapshot at Oregon State University CS program ("Expected 2025").
  • Three jobs listed: Dutch Brothers Coffee Roasting Facility manufacturing intern (May–Sept 2021, Grants Pass); Gtano's Restaurant busser (Dec 2018 – Mar 2021); Mini Pet Mart Lead Sales Rep (May–Aug 2020); HomeQuest Realty real-estate marketing intern (June 2018 – Feb 2019).
  • Skills: Spanish (Seal of Biliteracy), Discord/Slack, Google Workspace, Zoho CRM.
  • Awards: Ford Family Foundation scholarship recipient (May 2021, "90% education expense from a pool of 4,000"); National FBLA qualifier (June 2020, Securities & Investments, San Antonio nationals); Nick Fisher Award at YEBW (Aug 2019, business-excellence).
  • Cleanly pre-Occam Advisors / pre-Brotein resume — this is the credential stack Yahir was running before the founder identity emerged.

Notes

Time-capsule resume. The HomeQuest Realty bullet is the first vault evidence of Yahir doing email-marketing work ("Generated mass email marketing campaigns to increase buyer leads (150+ leads created)") and using Facebook Ad Manager — at age 17, three years before he uses the same skills as a Brotein credential in the Buzz Access cover letter. The through-line is real, not retrofit.

Gtano's / Dutch Bros / Mini Pet Mart / HomeQuest — these are the Grants Pass teen-era job stack. The Zoho CRM mention is a tell: pre-Salesforce/HubSpot, scrappy small-realty toolset.

Email contact is OSU-issued (gonzayah@oregonstate.edu, with a typo in the mailto link — oregonstaet). Phone retained — same number as the Buzz cover letter.

Connections

  • grants pass teen era — the job-stack chapter
  • dutch bros · gtanos · ford family foundation · fbla · yebw — credentials
  • facebook ads · email marketing · zoho crm — earliest documented marketing chops
  • 2025 10 07 buzz access cover letter — same skills, 3 years later

Privacy

  • Personal phone retained (publicly distributed on resume). OSU email retained (institutional, public-by-design).

related.label: Buzz Access Cover Letter — Marketing Coordinator pitch
